pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you grow. No hidden fees.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for trying out BIM Carbon

items.question: What's included in the free plan?
items.answer: The free plan includes 3 project analyses per month, basic carbon calculations using our Thai material database, and PDF export. It's perfect for trying out the platform.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
items.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate your billing accordingly.

items.question: Is the Thai material data accurate?
items.answer: Yes, our database includes 104+ materials with emission factors from TGO, MTEC, SCG EPD, and CPAC EPD - all specific to Thailand.

items.question: Do you support TGO certification?
items.answer: Pro and Enterprise plans include TGO-compliant CFO and CFP report generation ready for official certification submission.

items.question: What file formats do you accept?
items.answer: We support IFC (BIM), DWG, DXF, PDF floor plans, and Excel BOQ files.

items.question: Is there a contract or commitment?
items.answer: No contracts required. Pay monthly and cancel anytime. Yearly plans offer 17% discount.

hero.title: Building Sustainability
hero.subtitle: CarbonBIM empowers Thai construction professionals with AI-driven tools to analyze, reduce, and report embodied carbon in buildings. Meet TGO standards and win green certifications.

mission.title: Decarbonizing Thai Construction
mission.description: We believe sustainable construction should be accessible to every builder in Thailand. Our platform combines cutting-edge AI with local expertise to make carbon analysis fast, accurate, and actionable.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to analyze and reduce embodied carbon in your construction projects
features.aiPoweredDesc: Our multi-agent AI system automatically analyzes your BIM models for carbon hotspots and optimization opportunities
features.carbonAnalysisDesc: Calculate embodied carbon using Thailand's TGO emission factors and local material databases
features.clashDetectionDesc: Automatically detect coordination issues between structural, MEP, and architectural elements
features.codeComplianceDesc: Verify your designs meet Thai building codes and TREES certification requirements
features.visualization3dDesc: View and interact with your IFC models directly in the browser with our WebGL viewer
features.thaiLocalizedDesc: Full Thai language support with local emission factors and construction practices

technology.title: Built with Modern Tech
technology.subtitle: Enterprise-grade architecture designed for scale and reliability
technology.nextjsDesc: React framework for production-grade web applications
technology.langraphDesc: Multi-agent AI orchestration for complex analysis tasks
technology.ifcjsDesc: Open-source BIM toolkit for 3D model processing
technology.fastapiDesc: High-performance Python backend for AI computations

abcConstruction.subtitle: A small Thai contractor used BIM Carbon to differentiate from competitors and win ฿45M in green building projects.
abcConstruction.quote: We used to hire consultants for carbon reports. Now we do it ourselves in 15 minutes. Clients are very impressed.

studioVerde.subtitle: How Studio Verde used AI recommendations to redesign a 50,000 sqm office building and achieve TREES-NC Gold certification.
studioVerde.quote: The AI suggestions showed us alternatives we never considered. We achieved TREES Gold on our first submission.

greenHeights.subtitle: Green Heights Development secured ฿500M in green bonds by providing TGO-compliant carbon documentation across 5 projects.
greenHeights.quote: Banks require carbon documentation for green loans. BIM Carbon gave us investor-ready reports in days, not months.
